results.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

results.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
results.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

results.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
results.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

results.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
results.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

results.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
results.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

results.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
results.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

results.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
results.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

results.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
results.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

results.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
results.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

internalLinks.text:
For Startups
                                                            Get enterprise-grade monitoring without the complexity or cost.

For DevOps Teams
                                                            Reduce MTTR and eliminates alert fatigue with intelligent monitoring

For Enterprises
                                                            Unify monitoring across hundreds of services and teams at scale

For SRE Teams
                                                            Achieve reliability at scale with predictive insights and automation

pages.title: Autonomous IT Operations & Observability Platform | Scout

issues.description: H1 and title share no significant words.
issues.recommendation: Align H1 and title around the same primary topic/keyword.

value.title: Autonomous IT Operations & Observability Platform | Scout
value.h1: Event Intelligence That Goes Beyond Correlation

issues.description: H2 -> H6 skips a level.
issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:title is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:title" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:description is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:description" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:url is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:url" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:card is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:card" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:title is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:title" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:description is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:description" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:url is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:url" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:card is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:card" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

internalLinks.text:
For Startups
                                                            Get enterprise-grade monitoring without the complexity or cost.

For DevOps Teams
                                                            Reduce MTTR and eliminates alert fatigue with intelligent monitoring

For Enterprises
                                                            Unify monitoring across hundreds of services and teams at scale

For SRE Teams
                                                            Achieve reliability at scale with predictive insights and automation

pages.title: FinOps And Cost Optimization | scout

issues.description: H2 -> H6 skips a level.
issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:title is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:title" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:description is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:description" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:url is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:url" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:card is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:card" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

pages.title: Privacy Policy for Scout Monitoring Platform

issues.description: No <h1> on this page.
issues.recommendation: Add exactly one descriptive H1 per page.

issues.description: H2 -> H6 skips a level.
issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:title is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:title" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:description is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:description" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:image" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Open Graph tag og:url is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property="og:url" content="..."> for richer social sharing.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:card is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:card" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

issues.description: https://www.scoutagentics.com/feature/Privacy-policy.html returned 403

issues.description: Raw HTML body has ~25 chars; rendered has ~213 chars.

pages.title: Scaling Intelligent Observability | Scout & Broadcom

issues.description: No <h1> on this page.
issues.recommendation: Add exactly one descriptive H1 per page.

issues.description: H2 -> H6 skips a level.
issues.recommendation: Use heading levels sequentially (H1->H2->H3).

issues.description: Twitter Card tag twitter:image is missing.
issues.recommendation: Add <meta name="twitter:image" content="..."> for Twitter previews.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: URL path contains spaces or special characters.
issues.recommendation: Use only alphanumerics, hyphens, and forward slashes.

issues.description: Response not compressed (Content-Encoding: "none")
issues.recommendation: Enable gzip or brotli on the origin/CDN.

issues.description: No Cache-Control header on response.
issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.

issues.description: URL path contains uppercase letters.
issues.recommendation: Use lowercase URLs to avoid case-sensitive duplicates.

issues.description: URL path contains spaces or special characters.
issues.recommendation: Use only alphanumerics, hyphens, and forward slashes.

issues.recommendation: Set a Cache-Control header for HTML and static assets.

issues.description: 4 elements use font-size < 12px inline.
issues.recommendation: Use font-size >= 12px (16px is best for body) on mobile.

issues.description: No Strict-Transport-Security header on HTTPS response.
issues.recommendation: Add HSTS, e.g. "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains".

issues.description: Response is missing x-content-type-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff".

issues.description: Response is missing x-frame-options header.
issues.recommendation: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or use CSP frame-ancestors.

issues.description: Response is missing content-security-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy to mitigate XSS.

issues.description: Response is missing referrer-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Add a Referrer-Policy (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin").

issues.description: Response is missing permissions-policy header.
issues.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy to restrict powerful browser features.
